hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then PKG=$(echo "$FILE" | grep -oP 'packages/[^/]+'); if [ -n "$PKG" ]; then cd /Users/jonasliendl/repos/app && npm run lint --workspace="$PKG" -- --fix 2>&1; fi; fi
